truflation.label: Truflation US Inflation Rate
truflation._note: Daily snapshot from truflation.com/marketplace/us-inflation-rate via Playwright. YoY change.

ism_pmi.label: ISM Manufacturing PMI
ism_pmi._note: Latest published monthly value from investing.com. Updated 1st business day of each month at ISM release.

nft_mcap.label: NFT Aggregate Mkt Cap (DeFiLlama)
nft_mcap._note: Computed: sum(floor × supply) across 4118 collections × ETH $1701. Snapshot per cron run.

strategic_eth.label: Strategic ETH Reserve — Total ETH Held
strategic_eth._note: 14 historical points (extracted from chart SVG) + latest verified value: 7.33M ETH ($16.03B, 67 participants).

btc_etf_aum.label: BTC ETF — Cumulative Net Flows
btc_etf_aum._note: Grand-total cumulative net flows since BTC ETF launch. Per-ETF breakdown ($M): [62469, 10402, 2001, 1213, 220, 334, 328, 1151, 92, 303, 2249]. Snapshot per cron run.

eth_etf_aum.label: ETH ETF — Cumulative Net Flows
eth_etf_aum._note: Grand-total cumulative net flows since ETH ETF launch. Per-ETF breakdown ($M): [11310, 534, 2140, 386, 29, 167, 24, 66, 1879]. Snapshot per cron run.

tao_subnet.label: TAO Subnet Aggregate Mkt Cap (Bittensor)
tao_subnet._note: Daily aggregate sum of 9/100 subnet alpha tokens via CoinGecko per-coin /market_chart endpoint. 365 historical daily points (~365d). Subnet roster snapshot per cron — new subnets appear in the aggregate only after they list on CoinGecko.

cb_assets.label: Global CB Total Assets (Fed+ECB+BOJ+BOE+SNB)
cb_assets._note: Composite from BIS WS_CBTA (free public, BIS-spliced, break-adjusted). 5 major CBs summed in USD trillions, monthly. 148 historical points back to 2014. Replaces MacroMicro paywalled chart.

_meta.source: APIs: yfinance · OECD · IMF PCPS · World Bank · NY Fed · DeFiLlama · alternative.me · Ultrasound Money
